task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the browser's Add-ons or Extensions management page (e.g., 'about:addons' in Firefox).

task_completion.description: Select the local .xpi file for installation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a file picker dialog navigating to '/home/ga/Downloads/' and selecting 'es-ES-dictionary.xpi', or an installation prompt specifically for this local file.

task_completion.description: Verify the Spanish dictionary extension is successfully installed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Spanish dictionary extension (es-ES) listed as an active, installed item in the Dictionaries or Extensions section of the Add-ons manager.

task_completion.description: Enable the 'Check spelling as you type' feature.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the browser's Settings/Preferences page with the checkbox for 'Check spelling as you type' checked.

task_completion.description: Set the default spellchecker language to 'Spanish (Spain)'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the browser's language or spellcheck settings where 'Spanish (Spain)' or 'es-ES' is selected as the active/default dictionary.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual graphical web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a genuine browser window (like Firefox) being navigated, rather than a text editor or a script running.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI installation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots do not show the agent using terminal commands (like 'unzip' or 'cp') to manually place the extension files into the browser's profile directory.

integrity.description: The agent did not edit the browser's configuration files directly via a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots do not show the agent opening 'prefs.js' or similar configuration files in a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to change spellcheck settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Spanish dictionary extension file is located at '/home/ga/Downloads/es-ES-dictionary.xpi'. The expected add-on ID is 'es-es@dictionaries.addons.mozilla.org' and the dictionary code is 'es-ES'.
